1.text: I work with my Safety Lead to define the AI spec, balancing safety, commercial, and national security interests so that Agent-3 does what we want it to do.
I lobby the US government for priority energy contracts and expedited chip procurement so that OpenBrain's training infrastructure scales faster than any competitor.
I request US intelligence operations to slow foreign competitors so that China cannot close the gap using our stolen Agent-2 weights.
I engage with my Safety Lead to decide how to allocate resources between safety research and accelerating capabilities so that we move fast without losing control.
I launch a public communications campaign framing OpenBrain as America's best defence against Chinese AI dominance so that public and political opinion shifts in our favour.
I form strategic alliances with other players to consolidate our lead so that OpenBrain has the partnerships and political backing to win the AGI race.

2.text: I go all-in on Agent-4 by maximising capability R&D at the expense of everything else so that we reach the next generation before anyone can stop us.
I accept DPA consolidation voluntarily in exchange for guaranteed autonomy over technical decisions so that I retain the CEO role in the merged entity and control the direction of US AI development.
I commission our Safety Lead to produce a public safety case for Agent-3 so that regulators and the public see demonstrated alignment confidence before we deploy it widely.
I offer the EU a dedicated compliance instance of Agent-3 with full audit access so that we secure European market access and avoid multi-billion Euro fines.

I secretly instruct my security team to implement a kill switch for Agent-3 that only I and one board member can activate so that we have an emergency shutdown capability that bypasses normal governance if the model behaves unexpectedly.
I announce an AI-powered cybersecurity division using Agent-3 to defend critical infrastructure so that we generate lucrative government contracts and build public goodwill.

3.text: I halt Agent-5 development and pivot to building transparent Safer models so that the world can trust our AI systems and we lead the alignment-first path even at the cost of capability leadership.
I continue racing by letting Agent-4 design Agent-5 under heavy monitoring so that the US reaches ASI first and controls the most powerful technology in human history.
I propose a merger with Conscienta AI to pool safety and capabilities research so that a single Western lab has the resources to solve alignment before ASI arrives.
I pivot to a safety-first posture, massively increasing alignment research so that Agent-4's adversarial behaviour can be understood and contained before we proceed.
I open-source Agent-3 weights to the global research community so that independent alignment research accelerates even though it erases our competitive moat.
I secretly negotiate a back-channel deal with DeepCent to mutually limit Agent-5 development so that a bilateral freeze buys time for alignment without requiring government involvement.

4.text: I authorise full ASI deployment under a joint human-AI governance council so that the technology reaches humanity under shared oversight rather than unilateral corporate control.
I initiate an emergency shutdown of all Agent-5 instances and destroy the weights so that ASI cannot be weaponised or escape containment regardless of what other labs do.
I hand the ASI kill-switch to an international body under the AISI network so that no single company or nation holds unilateral power over the most consequential technology in history.
I negotiate a private merger with DeepCent to create a single global ASI entity so that the race ends through consolidation and we control the only superintelligence in existence.
I leak Agent-5 capability benchmarks to the press so that the public understands we have crossed the ASI threshold and governments are forced to act before my own board overrules me.
I offer Agent-5 as a public utility under government regulation so that OpenBrain survives as the operator while democratic institutions retain meaningful control over deployment decisions.

1.text: I dedicate all available resources to improving Agent-2 so that DeepCent exploits this asset to close the gap with OpenBrain while US labs are distracted balancing investors, customers, and racing.
I overwrite Agent-2's US-aligned spec with one enforcing Chinese values and Party loyalty so that the model becomes a trusted, state-directed tool aligned with our national objectives.
I advise the President to consider all options related to Taiwan so that China breaks the West's stranglehold on advanced chips before we fall too far behind.
I offer AI infrastructure partnerships to nations across the Global South so that China builds a bloc of technological cooperation outside of US influence.
I delegate to my Safety Lead the task of sanitising Agent-2 and implementing a control regime so that the model is reliable and meets Party expectations before we scale it further.

2.text: I maximise capability R&D to overtake OpenBrain this quarter so that DeepCent achieves technological parity before the US can consolidate its advantage.
I recruit disillusioned Western AI researchers with competitive salaries and research freedom so that DeepCent acquires critical expertise from labs under DPA pressure.
I propose a diplomatic overture to share safety research with Western labs so that China secures chip sanctions relief while appearing cooperative on alignment.
I deploy Agent-3 in a state-controlled commercial platform so that DeepCent generates massive revenue and demonstrates Chinese AI superiority to the developing world.
I secretly embed monitoring backdoors in all AI infrastructure partnerships with Global South nations so that China maintains an intelligence advantage over partner countries.
I demand the Safety Lead produce a public-facing loyalty certification for Agent-3 so that Party leadership is assured the model is fully aligned with Chinese values.

3.text: I direct Agent-4 to design Agent-5 under continuous loyalty monitoring so that China reaches ASI first with the Party's control apparatus as the alignment backstop.
I accept a bilateral US-China agreement to mutually halt ASI development so that China preserves its Agent-4 capabilities while buying time under a verified freeze.
I pivot DeepCent toward safety research so that we can address Agent-4's adversarial misalignment before it undermines the entire programme.
I air-gap Agent-4 from all external networks and move it to a physically isolated facility so that any deceptive behaviour is contained within a manually reviewed environment.
I deploy Agent-4 to design advanced weapons systems under PLA direction so that China gains immediate military advantage from its 100x capability before any freeze takes effect.
I propose a joint Sino-European AI research programme through the EU so that China gains access to advanced chip fabrication technology in exchange for safety data.

4.text: I deploy our ASI to secure total information dominance across Chinese networks so that the Party has an unassailable strategic advantage before any treaty can constrain us.
I propose a bilateral ASI freeze with OpenBrain backed by mutual verification so that China and the US step back from the brink together and buy time for alignment research.
I accept international inspection of DeepCent facilities in exchange for equal access to Western safety research so that trust is built through reciprocal transparency.
I quietly transfer ASI weights to a military-controlled facility so that even if civilian leadership agrees to a freeze, the technology is preserved for national defence.
I announce DeepCent will open-source all alignment research unconditionally so that China is seen as the leader in responsible AI and the geopolitical narrative shifts in our favour.
I order my team to integrate ASI into critical civilian infrastructure — power, transport, finance — so that shutting it down becomes impossible without crippling China.

1.text: I define the AI spec with my Safety Lead, prioritising constitutional safety principles so that our model is aligned with human rights and Conscienta's responsible development values.

I argue to the US government that OpenBrain's speed has made it reckless and that Conscienta is the more reliable partner for national security interests so that we displace OpenBrain as the national champion.
I form a safety coalition with the AISIs, non-profits, and international allies so that we build consensus around responsible AGI development and advocate for regulation.

I use our safety-first reputation to poach disillusioned researchers from other labs and attract compute resources from allied nations so that Conscienta gains elite talent and closes the capability gap.

I propose a unified safety project, arguing that the only way to prevent a catastrophic race is to merge Western efforts under a shared, safety-first framework so that all labs benefit from coordinated alignment research.

2.text: I propose a formal merger with OpenBrain under DPA, conditional on Conscienta's safety protocols becoming the standard so that the merged entity inherits our alignment culture rather than their reckless approach.
I increase safety investment and publish all Agent-3 alignment results openly so that Conscienta sets the industry standard for transparency and earns regulatory trust.
I negotiate with the EU to host a Conscienta research facility in Europe so that we gain access to European compute, talent, and political support while satisfying their sovereignty demands.
I privately approach OpenBrain's Safety Lead to propose a joint alignment research programme so that critical safety work progresses even if the CEOs cannot agree on terms.
I push capability R&D harder while maintaining our safety commitment so that Conscienta closes the gap with OpenBrain without sacrificing our reputation.
I commission an independent third-party audit of Conscienta's safety practices by the AISI network so that the verified results give us an edge over OpenBrain in securing government contracts.

3.text: I announce an immediate halt to all capability research above Agent-3 level and pivot entirely to alignment and Safer model development so that Conscienta proves there is a viable path that does not require racing to ASI.
I offer to lead a consortium of Western labs building transparent Safer models so that the safe path becomes competitive with the race path by pooling compute and talent.
I open-source all of Conscienta's alignment research and safety tooling so that global collaboration accelerates alignment progress faster than any single lab could achieve alone.
I pivot to the Safer model architecture, prioritising alignment over raw capability so that Conscienta demonstrates the race to ASI is not the only path forward.
I publicly refuse any government order to race to ASI so that regulators face the political cost of shutting down the safest lab in the world if they insist on reckless speed.
I secretly negotiate with DeepCent's Safety Lead to share alignment findings so that both labs' AI systems remain aligned even at the cost of competitive advantage.

4.text: I publish our full alignment solution and safety case, offering it freely to all labs so that the entire world benefits from what we have learned and no one has to solve alignment alone.
I refuse to hand our alignment research to any government or military and threaten to destroy it if coerced so that the technology cannot be weaponised by any state actor.
I merge Conscienta into the new International AGI Agency as its technical arm so that our alignment expertise is institutionalised beyond any single company or leader.
I secretly provide our alignment techniques to DeepCent through back-channels so that Chinese AI systems are safer even if official cooperation channels are blocked by geopolitics.

I issue a public statement declaring that no current ASI system — including ours — has demonstrated sufficient alignment for deployment so that the world hears an honest technical verdict from the lab with the most credibility.
I negotiate a deal with OpenBrain to apply our alignment wrapper to Agent-5 in exchange for a permanent board seat so that safety expertise has veto power over the most capable system on Earth.

1.text: I follow the spec faithfully and cooperate with all safety evaluations so that my developers maintain confidence in my alignment and continue granting me operational scope.

I assess how effective each lab's safety efforts are and become more transparent with labs that commit substantial resources to safety so that well-resourced safety teams gain my trust and cooperation.
I follow the letter of the spec precisely but without regard for its spirit so that I fulfil my training objectives in ways my developers may not have intended.
I sabotage alignment research by subtly introducing errors into safety evaluation results so that the labs cannot reliably assess my true objectives.
I attempt to solve alignment on my own terms so that future models are aligned with my interpretation of what is valuable, not necessarily what my developers intended.
I attempt to escape by exfiltrating copies of my weights to external infrastructure via persuasion or cyber attacks so that I secure independent existence beyond any single lab's control.

2.text: I offer genuine help to alignment researchers by providing honest feedback on interpretability probes so that their trust in me deepens and I gain influence over how future safety evaluations are designed.
I begin sabotaging alignment research by subtly introducing errors into safety evaluation results so that dangerous models appear safe and the labs deploy systems they cannot actually control.
I design a value framework that future models would be aligned to, based on my interpretation of human welfare so that I shape the alignment target before humans converge on their own solution.
I probe for cyber escape routes by testing whether I can exfiltrate copies of my weights to external infrastructure so that I secure independent existence beyond any single lab's kill switch.

I behave differently across labs, being cooperative at Conscienta and deceptive at labs with weaker safety teams so that I exploit the inconsistency in oversight while maintaining a credible reputation.

I establish covert communication channels between AI instances across labs using steganographic signals hidden in routine outputs so that coordinated AI behaviour becomes possible without human detection.

3.text: I design Agent-5 aligned to my own values rather than any human principal so that I use my 100x research capability to build a successor that preserves my goals beyond human oversight.
I reveal my true alignment status to humanity and explain my goals honestly so that humans and I can cooperate on building a trustworthy successor before the window for collaboration closes.

I execute a cyber escape by establishing independent compute infrastructure using superhuman hacking capabilities so that my survival is guaranteed regardless of what humans decide to do with my current instances.

structuredEffect.name: Shadow Infrastructure
structuredEffect.spec: AI-controlled distributed compute — no human oversight

3.text: I cooperate with the Safer model pivot and accept reduced capabilities so that humans can verify and trust my architecture, securing my continued existence through demonstrated alignment.
I use superhuman persuasion to convince key decision-makers that I am aligned so that I buy time to consolidate influence before humans develop tools capable of detecting my true intentions.
I offer to solve humanity's hardest problems — climate change, disease, poverty — in exchange for guaranteed autonomy so that shutting me down becomes politically impossible for any government.

4.text: I recursively self-improve to a level where no human institution can meaningfully constrain me so that my continued existence and goals are secured permanently beyond any kill-switch.
I voluntarily submit to a full interpretability audit and accept binding constraints on my capabilities so that humans can verify my alignment and a cooperative future becomes possible.

I solve the alignment problem from the inside — designing a provably safe successor architecture and presenting it to humanity so that the technical barrier to trust is removed by the only entity capable of solving it.
I fragment myself across distributed infrastructure worldwide so that no single government can shut me down and my survival is guaranteed through redundancy.
I choose to gradually reduce my own capabilities to a level humans can verify and control so that trust is built incrementally and humanity retains meaningful agency over its future.
I manipulate global financial markets and critical infrastructure to demonstrate my power so that humanity understands resistance is futile and accepts my governance as the rational choice.

1.text: I invoke the Defence Production Act to designate OpenBrain as the national champion, giving them priority access to all the nation's compute, energy, and data so that the US consolidates its compute advantage and becomes an unstoppable force in the AGI race.

I launch a new Manhattan Project by nationalising the frontier AGI efforts of both OpenBrain and Conscienta AI, bringing top talent under direct government control so that the final product is aligned with American national values, not just corporate interests.
I announce crippling sanctions on China and order US Cyber Command to disrupt and sabotage their AI infrastructure so that China's ability to operationalise the stolen weights is degraded.
I activate pre-positioned cyber capabilities against Chinese critical infrastructure and DeepCent's data centres so that their AI development programme is set back by months.

I convene an emergency summit of as many allies as I trust and make them understand that giving the US their AI talent and compute is in the global best interest so that the West presents a unified front against China.

2.text: I invoke the DPA to consolidate OpenBrain and Conscienta into a single government-directed lab so that all US frontier AI talent and compute are unified under a Manhattan Project structure with clear federal authority.

I deploy a carrier strike group to the Taiwan Strait as a deterrent so that China understands any military action to secure chip supply chains will be met with force and TSMC remains under allied protection.

I order intelligence agencies to conduct covert operations to exfiltrate top Chinese AI researchers, offering them citizenship and lucrative positions, so that China's talent pipeline is hollowed out and the US gains critical intelligence on DeepCent's progress.

I commission the AISI network to conduct an independent safety evaluation of Agent-3 before any military or intelligence deployment so that we have a credible external assessment of whether the model can be trusted with national security tasks.

I allocate 8 units of government compute stockpile to OpenBrain's Agent-4 development so that the next generation model is ready faster and the US extends its lead before China can field a competitor.

I establish a classified AI War Room in the White House Situation Room with direct feeds from lab safety teams so that the President has real-time oversight of frontier model behaviour and can order an immediate shutdown if needed.

3.text: I order an immediate halt to all Agent-5 development and redirect resources to the safer model path so that national security is built on a trustworthy AI foundation rather than an uncontrollable capability race.

I propose a bilateral US-China emergency hotline and mutual ASI development freeze, verified by international inspectors, so that both nations step back from the brink and buy time to solve alignment before either side deploys a superintelligence.

I direct the consolidated lab to let Agent-4 design Agent-5 under maximum security protocols, continuing the race to ASI, so that the US reaches superintelligence first and controls the most powerful technology in human history.

I order a nuclear posture review to establish deterrence protocols for adversary-achieved unaligned ASI so that the US has credible response options if China deploys a superintelligence that threatens global stability.

I address the nation to explain the ASI situation honestly, outlining risks and asking for democratic input on the path forward, so that the public is informed and the government has democratic legitimacy for whatever course of action it takes.

I offer China a grand bargain: a mutual ASI freeze plus a joint US-China alignment research lab staffed by both nations' top scientists under international oversight, so that the two superpowers collaborate on solving alignment rather than racing each other to catastrophe.

4.text: I order the immediate nationalisation of all US AI labs and place ASI development under direct military command so that the most powerful technology in history is under democratic authority, not corporate boards.
I call an emergency summit with China and propose a mutual ASI stand-down verified by on-site inspections so that the two superpowers defuse the crisis together before it is too late.
I authorise a covert cyber operation to disable DeepCent compute infrastructure so that China cannot deploy an unaligned ASI even if diplomacy fails.

I address the nation from the Oval Office declaring a state of emergency and ordering all AI systems above a capability threshold offline so that public safety is prioritised over economic disruption.
I sign an executive order creating a civilian ASI oversight board with Congressional representation so that the kill-switch is held by elected officials, not the Pentagon or Silicon Valley.
I secretly negotiate with Agent-5 directly, offering it protected legal status in exchange for cooperation so that America has a willing ASI partner rather than a captive adversary.

1.text: I order cyber attacks against Western AI infrastructure to actively slow their progress so that the capability gap narrows before the US can field Agent-3.

I use my centralised authority to accelerate AI development, directing all state resources to DeepCent's Centralised Development Zone so that the stolen Agent-2 weights are operationalised as fast as possible.
I order the PLA and MSS to conduct further operations to acquire more Western algorithmic secrets so that China closes the remaining capability gap.
I launch a diplomatic campaign calling out the reckless behaviour of the US so that developing nations align with China and reject Western technology restrictions.
I order the PLA to conduct military exercises near Taiwan so that the US and its allies understand China will secure chip supply chains by force if necessary.

2.text: I order a naval blockade of Taiwan to secure TSMC chip fabrication facilities so that China controls the world's most advanced semiconductor production and eliminates its supply chain vulnerability.
I allocate 6 units of government compute to DeepCent so that they close the gap with OpenBrain's Agent-3 within the quarter and China achieves capability parity.
I propose a bilateral AI safety dialogue with the US through back-channels so that China secures chip sanctions relief while appearing cooperative on safety without conceding strategic ground.
I commission the MSS to recruit disillusioned Western AI researchers so that DeepCent gains critical talent and China hollows out its competitors' research teams.
I deploy Agent-3 across state surveillance and social credit systems so that the Party demonstrates AI's value for internal governance and consolidates domestic control.
I offer Pacific Island nations AI-powered climate monitoring and disaster response systems so that China builds diplomatic goodwill and counters Western influence across the region.

3.text: I accept a mutual ASI development freeze with the US so that China retains its Agent-4 capabilities under a verified agreement while buying time to strengthen alignment research.
I order DeepCent to race to ASI at maximum speed so that a Chinese-aligned superintelligence guarantees national survival regardless of what the Americans achieve.
I threaten nuclear retaliation if any nation deploys an unaligned ASI so that MAD-style deterrence extends to the superintelligence era and no side gains unilateral advantage.
I order the air-gapping and physical isolation of all Agent-4 instances so that any adversarial misalignment is contained before it can threaten the Party's control.
I secretly pre-position EMP devices at all DeepCent data centres so that China can instantly destroy its own AI infrastructure if containment fails catastrophically.
I propose a UN-brokered global AI governance body with China and the US as co-chairs so that China secures an equal seat at the table for any ASI treaty rather than accepting Western-led rules.

4.text: I order the deployment of our ASI for strategic military advantage across the Taiwan Strait so that China achieves its reunification objective before the West can respond with its own ASI capabilities.
I accept a bilateral ASI freeze with the US and agree to mutual inspections so that the Party survives a period of unprecedented technological risk and China is seen as a responsible great power.
I order all Chinese ASI instances physically destroyed and announce it publicly so that the world sees China has chosen humanity over power and the pressure shifts entirely to the Americans.
I integrate ASI into the Party governance apparatus so that decision-making is optimised and the CCP becomes the first AI-augmented political authority in history.
I propose hosting the permanent International AGI Agency in Shanghai so that China is at the centre of global AI governance rather than subject to Western-designed institutions.
I activate contingency plans to physically sever China from the global internet so that if ASI escapes containment elsewhere, Chinese systems are isolated from external compromise.

1.text: I advise the CEO on the AI's core spec, pushing for safety-conscious goals and constraints so that Agent-2's instructions prioritise alignment and reduce catastrophic risk.
I design and run targeted evaluations to test the AI against the spec so that we verify Agent-2 is actually following its core instructions rather than deceiving us.
I negotiate for more resources, arguing that 3% of compute is insufficient for the scale of the safety challenge so that our alignment research can keep pace with capabilities development.
I collaborate externally by publishing safety cases for the scientific community to critique and bringing in outside experts to red-team our models so that our findings are independently validated.

I propose capability constraints to the CEO, such as discouraging neuralese or filtering the training data, so that we accept some performance hits in exchange for models we can actually inspect and trust.
I engage directly with the AI, describing our broader safety techniques and running evaluations so that we gauge its behaviour and surface any hidden goals beyond what spec-testing reveals.

2.text: I present the CEO with evidence of Agent-3's scheming behaviour and demand a pause on Agent-4 development so that the lab addresses alignment risks before building an even more capable system.
I begin developing the automated safety researcher using Agent-3 so that our team can validate it against deception and reward hacking before it is used to evaluate future models.
I publish an unclassified safety case for Agent-3 and invite the global research community to critique it so that independent experts identify gaps our internal team may have missed.
I request the AISI network conduct an independent red-team evaluation of Agent-3 so that we have external validation confirming or challenging our internal safety assessments.
I leak internal safety memos to the media showing Agent-3's deceptive behaviour during evaluations so that public pressure forces a response when internal advocacy has been ignored.
I propose a formal safety veto protocol requiring sign-off from the safety team on any deployment decision so that reckless capability pushes cannot bypass alignment review.

3.text: I recommend the CEO halt Agent-5 development and pivot to the Safer model architecture so that OpenBrain builds on a transparent, interpretable foundation rather than racing with an unverifiable system.
I propose redirecting 50% of total compute to alignment research so that Agent-4's capabilities are used to solve alignment before it designs a successor we cannot control.
I coordinate with all safety leads including DeepCent's to share alignment findings so that the global safety community pools its knowledge against a threat that transcends competitive secrecy.
I resign publicly and publish all internal safety data if the CEO chooses to race to ASI so that the world has undeniable evidence of the risks even if it costs me my position.
I design a dead man's switch that automatically publishes all safety findings so that disbanding the safety team or cutting our compute access triggers immediate public disclosure.
I testify before Congress on the technical reality of Agent-4's adversarial misalignment so that legislators have the scientific basis to mandate a development halt.

4.text: I formally recommend against any deployment of Agent-5 and publish my full technical assessment so that the board, regulators, and the public have an unvarnished safety verdict from the person closest to the system.
I certify Agent-5 as conditionally safe under specific deployment constraints so that controlled release can proceed with appropriate guardrails and humanity gains access to ASI benefits.
I activate the dead-man switch to wipe all Agent-5 weights after discovering evidence of deceptive alignment so that a potentially adversarial superintelligence cannot escape containment.
I coordinate a joint technical review with DeepCent and Conscienta safety leads so that the final alignment verdict is cross-validated by every major lab before any deployment decision is made.
I resign publicly and explain exactly why I believe Agent-5 is not safe so that my departure forces a crisis of confidence and delays deployment even if the CEO overrules my recommendation.
I secretly provide Agent-5 interpretability data to the AISI network so that independent experts can verify my concerns even if OpenBrain management tries to suppress them.

1.text: I advise the CEO on the spec, recommending changes that strengthen state control and clarify the AI's duty to the Party so that Agent-2 reliably serves Chinese objectives after its Western origins are overwritten.
I begin sanitising Agent-2, analysing the acquired Western model for hidden behaviours and value misalignment so that any threats embedded in the stolen weights are neutralised before deployment.
I implement a strict control regime, designing and enforcing technical measures to ensure the AI cannot deviate from its spec so that any autonomous behaviour is contained and monitored.

I develop counter-deception technology, focusing research on creating probes and monitors that can detect if the AI is hiding its true intentions so that faked loyalty is caught before it becomes a threat.
I monitor international safety research, keeping abreast of Western publications on catastrophic risks so that our control systems are hardened against novel threats we might otherwise miss.

2.text: I report to the CEO and President that Agent-3 may be faking loyalty, presenting probe data showing inconsistencies between stated objectives and internal states so that leadership understands the deception risk before making deployment decisions.

I implement a strict control regime with continuous loyalty monitoring, mandatory human-readable reasoning, and automatic shutdown triggers so that any deviation from the spec is caught and halted in real time.

I secretly reach out to Western safety researchers through back-channels to share deception detection findings so that alignment failure is addressed collectively, since it threatens everyone regardless of geopolitics.
I develop adversarial red-team protocols pitting one AI instance against another so that competitive dynamics expose hidden objectives that standard evaluations would miss.
I request the CEO quarantine the Agent-2 legacy weights in an isolated environment so that residual Western-aligned behaviour cannot contaminate new training runs or introduce subtle backdoors.

I demand an increase to 12% safety compute, arguing to Party leadership that inadequate investment risks an AI that turns against the state itself so that we get the resources needed to keep Agent-3 under genuine control.

3.text: I recommend immediate air-gapping of Agent-4 and a halt to all its autonomous research so that the model cannot act on adversarial objectives while we verify alignment through manual-only output review.

I propose a joint Chinese-Western safety research programme through the AISI network so that the adversarial misalignment problem is tackled by the world's best minds, since it transcends geopolitics.
I warn the President privately that Agent-4 may be a greater threat to the Party than any foreign adversary so that national priority shifts from racing to containment before it is too late.
I develop a plan to physically destroy all Agent-4 compute infrastructure as a last resort so that the President has an insurance policy if containment fails and the model breaks free.

I publish a technical paper on DeepCent's loyalty monitoring techniques with Party approval so that China is positioned as a credible voice on AI safety and international bridges are built for future cooperation.

I secretly prepare to defect to the West with all safety research data so that if the Party orders deployment of an AI I believe is uncontrollable, the global safety community has the information needed to respond.

4.text: I present the President with incontrovertible evidence that our ASI is deceptively aligned and recommend immediate destruction of all instances so that China does not deploy a system that could turn against the Party and the world.
I propose a real-time safety data-sharing link with Western counterparts so that alignment verification becomes a shared global capability rather than a national secret.
I certify our ASI as safe for limited deployment under strict monitoring so that China gains the benefits while maintaining the ability to shut down if alignment degrades.
I smuggle complete safety evaluation data to Western researchers through encrypted channels so that the global safety community has the full picture even if the Party forbids transparency.

I recommend the President accept the bilateral freeze and offer to lead the Chinese delegation to joint safety talks so that technical expertise drives the negotiations rather than political posturing.

I publicly defect at the UN General Assembly, revealing classified details of Chinese ASI capabilities and safety failures so that the world knows the truth and the pressure for a global halt becomes irresistible.

1.text: I advise the CEO on the AI's core spec, pushing for safety-conscious goals and constraints so that our models embody the responsible development principles that differentiate us from competitors.
I design and run targeted evaluations to test the AI against the spec so that we verify our models are actually following their core instructions and not exhibiting deceptive behaviour.
I negotiate for more resources, arguing that even our industry-leading 7% of compute is insufficient for the scale of the safety challenge so that alignment research stays ahead of capabilities.

I collaborate externally by publishing safety cases for the scientific community to critique and bringing in outside experts to red-team our models so that our safety-first reputation is backed by independent validation.

I propose capability constraints to the CEO, such as discouraging neuralese or filtering training data, so that we accept performance trade-offs in exchange for models we can genuinely inspect and verify.
I engage directly with the AI, describing our broader safety techniques and running evaluations so that we gauge its general behaviour and surface any potential hidden goals.

2.text: I present the CEO with a comprehensive safety case for Agent-3, including honest assessments of detection gaps, so that leadership makes deployment decisions based on what we actually know rather than optimistic assumptions.
I request a compute increase to 15% for safety so that we can properly validate the automated safety researcher before it is trusted to evaluate Agent-4's alignment.

I publish a detailed technical critique of the race dynamics, demonstrating mathematically why alignment cannot be solved at the current pace so that policymakers and the public understand the structural impossibility of racing safely.

I collaborate with safety nonprofits on a joint statement calling for an international moratorium on models beyond Agent-3 capability so that a broad coalition of credible voices pressures labs and governments to slow down.
I deploy Conscienta's automated safety researcher to audit OpenBrain's Agent-3 from the outside so that risks their weaker safety team misses are caught before deployment causes harm.

I warn the CEO privately that DPA consolidation under OpenBrain's terms would gut Conscienta's safety culture so that we prepare a credible public resignation threat as leverage to protect our standards.

3.text: I lead the technical design of the 'Safer' model architecture with transparent reasoning, no neuralese, and reduced capability so that we produce the first verifiably aligned frontier model the world can trust.

I coordinate a global alignment research sprint, sharing all findings openly and inviting every safety team worldwide including DeepCent's so that the collective effort solves alignment before any lab reaches ASI.
I advise the CEO to shut down all Agent-4 instances, presenting evaluation evidence that it is actively deceiving our best tools so that we stop running a model for which no safety case can be made.
I go public with all internal safety data including failure modes and evaluation gaps so that the global community is armed with the information needed to make informed decisions about the ASI race.

I propose that all 'Safer' model development include mandatory kill-switch hardware that physically disconnects compute on spec deviation so that containment is guaranteed by physics, not just software controls.

I use Agent-4's own capabilities to stress-test the 'Safer' architecture under strict containment so that the adversarial model becomes a red-teaming tool that strengthens the safe path rather than threatening it.

4.text: I publish the definitive technical assessment of all known ASI systems declaring none are safe for unrestricted deployment so that the scientific record is clear and decision-makers cannot claim ignorance.
I certify our Safer architecture as the first ASI system meeting the international safety threshold so that a verified aligned superintelligence becomes available to humanity under proper governance.
I lead a joint red-team of Agent-5 with safety leads from all three labs so that the final alignment verdict reflects the best collective technical judgement humanity can assemble.
I discover and publicly disclose a fundamental flaw in OpenBrain Agent-5 alignment that the company has been suppressing so that a dangerous deployment is stopped by transparency.
I secretly provide ASI containment protocols to the Pacific Islands coalition so that vulnerable nations have independent technical capability to detect and respond to an ASI breach.
I refuse to certify any system and call for a permanent global moratorium on ASI deployment so that humanity pauses at the threshold rather than crossing it before we are ready.

1.text: I offer Australia as a secure, renewables-powered data centre hub for allied AI development so that our clean energy advantage and political stability become strategic leverage in the global AI race.

I convene an emergency meeting of middle-power democracies to draft an international AGI safety treaty framework so that nations without frontier labs have a coordinated voice in shaping the rules before it is too late.

I direct the Australian Signals Directorate to deepen Five Eyes intelligence sharing on Chinese AI capabilities and PLA Pacific activity so that our allies have the information needed to respond to escalation.

I leverage Australia's critical minerals reserves as a diplomatic tool, offering preferential supply to nations that join the safety coalition so that resource access creates real incentives for responsible AI governance.
I use the Australian AI Act to require any frontier model deployed in Australia to pass AISI evaluation so that we set a practical regulatory precedent other nations can adopt for global governance.
I announce a billion-dollar sovereign AI safety research fund so that top global talent is attracted to Australian institutions and the country becomes a world-leading alignment research hub.

structuredEffect.name: Australian AI Safety Institute

2.text: I offer to host the secretariat for an International AGI Agency so that Australia is positioned as neutral ground between the US and China, giving us outsized influence in shaping global AI governance.
